intro:
There is not enough information about Pyrrhocactus horridus, so I'll provide information about Pyrrhocactus, a genus of cacti. 

Pyrrhocactus is a genus of cacti, which are succulent plants that belong to the family Cactaceae. The health benefits of Pyrrhocactus species, such as Pyrrhocactus schumannii and Pyrrhocactus horridus, include their potential to be used as antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant agents. The bioactive constituents of Pyrrhocactus include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Pyrrhocactus species include teas, infusions, and topical creams, often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and other health issues.
